headlines.title: Midnight social media curfew proposed for UK teens aged 16 and 17 - but they can opt out
headlines.description: The government also wants 'addictive' app features such as auto-play and infinite scroll to be set to be disabled.

headlines.title: Trump threatens to bomb bridges and power plants unless Iran resumes talks
headlines.description: Trump's comments aired as the two countries exchanged fire for the fourth day in a row and the US resumed blockading Iranian ports.

headlines.title: I still feel pain of '98 but this can be different for England, says Shearer

headlines.title: Review of MP security needed after Widdecombe death, Burnham says

headlines.title: Briton's Iran jail sentence extended by two years, family says

headlines.title: After record heat, could the Atlantic make Britain's weather even more extreme?
headlines.description: As temperatures rise, scientists are investigating whether a changing Atlantic could bring more volatile weather to the UK

headlines.title: UK heatwave delivers exceptional sunshine and persistent 30C temperatures
headlines.description: The current heatwave has been hot, dry and exceptionally sunny with some locations seeing double the number of sunshine hours usually recorded at this point in the month, as Darren Bett explains.

headlines.title: How will Buy Now Pay Later changes affect you?
headlines.description: Consumers should be better protected as Buy Now Pay Later lenders now require authorisation to operate.

headlines.title: Seven Britons among those killed in Spain wildfires

headlines.title: I changed jobs 10 times in 10 years to get the career I wanted
